overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic urban environment. The player traverses covered walkways, an underpass with homeless encampments, an elevated pedestrian bridge, and a neon-lit arcade area. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with industrial concrete structures, vibrant neon advertisements, and mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with vending machines

events.description: turns right following the curved walkway past orange industrial pillars

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered pedestrian market area, passing vending machines and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: woman in white top walking toward camera then passing by
person in red jacket walking away from camera

entered.detail: illuminated vending machine with 'COLA' branding and product display
large cylindrical concrete pillar with orange paint and graffiti
metal walkway bridge spanning above the corridor with glass panels
illuminated advertisement displays showing various products
large planters with greenery lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered commercial walkway with a high ceiling and glass skylights. Vending machines and digital advertisements line the walls while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The environment features industrial orange pillars and concrete flooring with scattered planters.

events.description: enters darker underpass area with artificial lighting from barrel fire
passes makeshift camp with burning barrel and graffiti-covered wall

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a dimly lit underpass, navigating past a homeless encampment

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead into the underpass

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and overhead highway structure creating enclosed corridor
concrete wall covered in white graffiti text reading 'MERCY IS FOR THE WEAK' and 'DIE DIE DIE'
metal barrel with active fire providing warm orange light
makeshift shelter with green tarp and wooden posts
bright yellow concrete blocks marking path edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a darker, enclosed underpass beneath elevated highways. The player passes a homeless encampment with a burning barrel fire, green tarp shelters, and walls covered in aggressive graffiti. The lighting shifts to artificial sources with deep shadows cast by concrete pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking city street

events.description: exits underpass onto elevated walkway with view of city street below
turns left following the curved yellow-railed walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated pedestrian bridge with chain-link fencing, observing traffic below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue dress walking ahead on the elevated path
person in white shirt walking in same direction

entered.detail: bright yellow concrete and metal railings lining the elevated walkway
metal mesh fencing separating walkway from drop to street level
view of multi-lane road with vehicles and distant buildings
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the underpass onto an elevated pedestrian walkway with bright yellow railings. Chain-link fencing provides safety while offering views of the city street below with moving traffic. The lighting becomes brighter with natural sunlight filtering through the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with descending ramp

events.description: begins descending ramp/stairs from elevated walkway to street level
enters area with intense neon signage and artificial illumination

agents.ego_description: walking down a ramp from the elevated walkway into a bustling commercial area with bright neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the ramp ahead of the player

entered.detail: large red and blue neon sign with 'CIRRUS' text and star logo
ramp with yellow painted edges leading down to street level
storefronts with illuminated signs at ground level
metal pipe scaffolding with wooden planks ahead

segments.scene_description: The player descends a ramp from the elevated walkway into a vibrant commercial district. Bright neon signs including a prominent 'CIRRUS' advertisement illuminate the scene. The environment transitions from the elevated path to street level with scaffolding structures and shopfronts becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor-outdoor arcade with scaffolding and game machines

events.description: enters covered arcade area with metal scaffolding framework overhead
passes camping tent setup inside the arcade area near game machines

agents.ego_description: navigating through a neon-lit arcade area, passing rows of game machines and scaffolding structures

notable_agents.action: person standing near arcade machines on the right side

entered.detail: extensive metal pipe scaffolding structure with wooden platforms overhead
rows of illuminated retro-style arcade cabinets with glowing screens
crisscrossing pattern of red, green, and yellow string lights attached to scaffolding
orange and white camping tent with lantern light inside, set up between arcade machines
large billboard with smiling clown face and product branding

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a unique covered arcade space dominated by metal scaffolding and crisscrossing colorful string lights. Rows of retro arcade machines line the walkway, while a makeshift camping tent sits incongruously among the gaming equipment. The area has a festive yet industrial atmosphere with neon advertisements and scattered debris on the concrete floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile commercial walkway through a gritty urban underpass and finally into a vibrant, neon-lit arcade district. It begins within a high-ceilinged corridor of glass skylights and orange pillars, moving past digital advertisements and pedestrians before descending into a dark, enclosed underpass. As the camera passes burning barrels and graffiti-covered walls in the shadows, the scene then opens up onto an elevated pedestrian bridge where bright yellow railings and natural sunlight reveal the city traffic below. The perspective then descends a ramp into a bustling commercial zone illuminated by prominent neon signs, shifting from the open air toward the street level. Finally, the movement leads into a covered arcade space where metal scaffolding and colorful string lights hang over rows of retro gaming machines and makeshift tents.
